elements.text: KET candidates often make mistakes describing where with at, on, in or to. You might have to say where you are, where you did something, where something is or where you want to go.

elements.text: Example Come by / in a bus!

elements.id: mineru_color_textbook_zhonggaokao_小学_KET听说读写逐项突破_KET听说读写逐项突破之轻松搞定KET写作25分 【10讲 褚连一】_第09讲第九课写作Part9小作文详解_【8054】第九课写作Part9小作文详解_page_001_14
elements.text: 1 He invited me at / to his home. 2 It was on / in TV! 3 Shesplayingon/in the concert. 4 Call me at /on 57743. 5 You are important at / to me. 6 I'm interested at / in music. 7 Welcome in / to my town! 8 I'm on / in holiday! 9 The book is grey in / on the front. 10 Jose's at / in his best friends house.

elements.text: Example We went in a museum with our teacher. to. 1 Your school bag is to the table in your room. 2 My classmates are at France now. 3 We went in a restaurant and had a curry. 4 My family arrived at New York yesterday. 5You can buy the CD to the new music shop. 6 I was in a party at il's house.
